2606.28457.title: Extracting Knowledge from an Arabic-English Machine-Readable Dictionary Using Information Extraction
2606.28457.paper_summary: Natural language processing (NLP) applications need large and rich amount of linguistic knowledge. Furthermore, electronic language sources such as dictionaries, encyclopedia, and corpora became available. So, automatic methods are emerged to extract lexical information from those sources to overcome the knowledge acquisition bottleneck. We presented a method to automatically extract lexical information from a machine-readable version of the Arabic-English Al-Mawrid dictionary. We used n-gram analysis and key-word-in-context (KWIC) analysis to discover lexical patterns that manifest morphologic, syntactic, or semantic information. Then, we used hand-crafted rule-based information extraction to extract that information. Furthermore, we used punctuation marks and some heuristics to extract a set of synonyms in a subentry. This study registered high precision for all types of information, high recall for synonyms, and low recall for the other information. The study also showed that the Al-Mawrid has significant amount of derivations (morphologic information) and synonyms, domain labels, and hyponym/hypernym relations (semantic information).
2606.28457.paper_summary_zh: 自然語言處理 (NLP) 應用需要大量且豐富的語言知識。<lb/>此外，電子語言資源如字典、百科全書和語料庫也變得可用。<lb/>因此，自動化方法應運而生，以從這些來源中提取詞彙信息，克服知識獲取的瓶頸。<lb/>我們提出了一種從阿拉伯語-英語 Al-Mawrid 字典的機器可讀版本自動提取詞彙信息的方法。<lb/>我們使用 n-gram 分析和關鍵詞上下文 (KWIC) 分析來發現表現形態、句法或語義信息的詞彙模式。<lb/>然後，我們使用手工製作的基於規則的信息提取來提取這些信息。<lb/>此外，我們使用標點符號和一些啟發式方法來提取子條目中的同義詞集合。<lb/>本研究對所有類型的信息註冊了高精度，對同義詞的召回率高，對其他信息的召回率低。<lb/>研究還顯示，Al-Mawrid 擁有大量的派生詞（形態信息）和同義詞、領域標籤以及下位詞/上位詞關係（語義信息）。
2606.28457.author: Diaa M. Fayed et.al.
2606.28457.authors: Diaa M. Fayed, Aly A. Fahmy, Mohsen A. Rashwan, Wafaa K. Fayed
